title: Security: Chrome OS : Two security bugs of mwifiex
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
Hi Team,  
  
While reviewing marvell wifi driver mwifiex used by chromebooks, I found 2 security bugs. I have send them to security@kernel.org and linux kernel maillists, security@kernel.org let me wait for maillists' responses.  
  
https://crbug.com/chromium/1:
